programs.desc: Join the team as they debate the hottest AFL topics and preview the biggest games over the weekend. Sit back, relax and enjoy Kick Ons after the Footy!

programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: While in Texas, the guys find two once-in-a-lifetime automotive picking opportunities before meeting another collector with a meteorite and branding irons, and afterwards, a sprawling junkyard has an owner who is reluctant to sell.

programs.title: American Restoration
programs.desc: Rick is contacted to restore a replica of an F-105 fighter jet. Will the crew be able to execute their plan of attack, or will they miss the mark and abort the mission?
